ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parking_lots" (
  "parking_lot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking lot */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parking lot */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the parking lot */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the parking lot */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the parking lot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking lot was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking lot was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_lot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_lot_status" (
  "parking_lot_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking lot status */,
  "parking_lot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking lot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the parking lot (e.g., open, closed, under maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking lot status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking lot status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_lot_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_spots" (
  "parking_spot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking spot */,
  "parking_lot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parking lot the spot belongs to */,
  "spot_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the parking spot */,
  "spot_type" TEXT /* Type of parking spot (e.g., compact, large) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per hour for the parking spot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking spot was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking spot was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_spot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_spots_parking_lot_id FOREIGN KEY ("parking_lot_id") REFERENCES parking_lots ("parking_lot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_spot_status" (
  "parking_spot_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking spot status */,
  "parking_spot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking spot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the parking spot (e.g., available, occupied, reserved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking spot status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking spot status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_spot_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reservation */,
  "parking_spot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking spot reserved */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the reservation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the reservation */,
  "reservation_type" TEXT /* Type of reservation (e.g., short-term, long-term, event-based) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reservation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reservation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_parking_spot_id FOREIGN KEY ("parking_spot_id") REFERENCES parking_spots ("parking_spot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservation_payments" (
  "reservation_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation payment */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation the payment is for */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reservation payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reservation payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_payments_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_payments_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservation_history" (
  "reservation_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation history entry */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the reservation at the time of the update */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the reservation status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservation_history_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_lot_availability" (
  "parking_lot_availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking lot availability entry */,
  "parking_lot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking lot */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the availability entry */,
  "available_spots" INTEGER /* Number of available parking spots */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking lot availability was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking lot availability was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_lot_availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_lot_availability_parking_lot_id FOREIGN KEY ("parking_lot_id") REFERENCES parking_lots ("parking_lot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_lot_occupancy" (
  "parking_lot_occupancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking lot occupancy entry */,
  "parking_lot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking lot */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the occupancy entry */,
  "occupied_spots" INTEGER /* Number of occupied parking spots */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking lot occupancy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking lot occupancy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_lot_occupancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_lot_occupancy_parking_lot_id FOREIGN KEY ("parking_lot_id") REFERENCES parking_lots ("parking_lot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "parking_lot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking lot */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the revenue entry */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the parking lot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revenue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revenue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_parking_lot_id FOREIGN KEY ("parking_lot_id") REFERENCES parking_lots ("parking_lot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refund_policy" (
  "refund_policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund policy */,
  "parking_lot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking lot */,
  "reservation_type" TEXT /* Type of reservation (e.g., short-term, long-term, event-based) */,
  "refund_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the refund */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the refund policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the refund policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refund_policy_parking_lot_id FOREIGN KEY ("parking_lot_id") REFERENCES parking_lots ("parking_lot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "parking_lot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking lot */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the discount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discount was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_parking_lot_id FOREIGN KEY ("parking_lot_id") REFERENCES parking_lots ("parking_lot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_lot_pricing" (
  "parking_lot_pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking lot pricing entry */,
  "parking_lot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking lot */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per hour for the parking lot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking lot pricing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parking lot pricing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_lot_pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_lot_pricing_parking_lot_id FOREIGN KEY ("parking_lot_id") REFERENCES parking_lots ("parking_lot_id")
)
